title: Voluntary Support Provided to Help Lindsey Start Over
subtitle: Beyond every shared expense listed above — and beyond anything any court has ordered — Gerald has voluntarily and continuously carried Lindsey's vehicle, its insurance, and her health coverage since their separation, so that she could re-establish herself on stable footing. These amounts were never billed to her and are documented here to show the full, good-faith extent of the support he has provided.

alt: Paid voluntarily by Gerald, of his own accord, to ease Lindsey's transition to an independent household. Health & GEICO auto: Aug 2024 – May 2026; vehicle loan: Aug 2024 – Mar 2026. Underlying statements available on request.
grand_label: TOTAL VOLUNTARY SUPPORT PROVIDED TO LINDSEY
statement: For the court's context: none of the payments in this section were ordered or required of Gerald. He made them by choice, month after month — keeping Lindsey mobile, insured, and covered — to ease her transition into an independent household. This is support extended in good faith, well beyond his obligations, to help the mother of his children get back on her feet.
